ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the city is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Current population of the city */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the city */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the city */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the city was founded */,
  "area" REAL /* Total area of the city in square kilometers */,
  "mayor" TEXT /* Name of the current mayor */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official city website */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_growth" (
  "growth_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each growth record */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city associated with the growth record */,
  "growth_percentage" REAL /* Growth percentage over the specified period */,
  "period" TEXT /* Description of the period (e.g., 2000-2013) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Specific year for which the growth percentage is calculated */,
  "estimated_population" INTEGER /* Estimated population at the end of the period */,
  "growth_source" TEXT /* Source of the growth data (e.g., census, survey) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("growth_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_growth_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographic_data" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city associated with the demographic data */,
  "age_distribution" TEXT /* Age distribution statistics for the city */,
  "ethnic_distribution" TEXT /* Ethnic distribution statistics for the city */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of residents in the city */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the city */,
  "gender_distribution" TEXT /* Gender distribution statistics for the city */,
  "household_size" REAL /* Average household size */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Percentage of the population living below the poverty line */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate in the city */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Distribution of educational levels */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "city_services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service record */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city offering the service */,
  "service_type" TEXT /* Type of service (e.g., healthcare, education) */,
  "service_description" TEXT /* Description of the service */,
  "service_provider" TEXT /* Entity providing the service */,
  "service_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the service */,
  "service_hours" TEXT /* Operating hours of the service */,
  "service_cost" REAL /* Cost of the service (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_city_services_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "urban_planners" (
  "planner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each urban planner */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the urban planner */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for contact */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city they are associated with */,
  "title" TEXT /* Job title of the urban planner */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number for contact */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department they belong to */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date they started their position */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Areas of expertise */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("planner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_urban_planners_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "city_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city the report is regarding */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., annual, quarterly) */,
  "author" TEXT /* Name of the person who authored the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, finalized) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the report file (if stored externally) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_city_reports_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)
